title: CDX-2089 Music Player
description: A skin-adaptive 3D music player with five futuristic disc decks, audio-reactive visuals, and an unfolding dance floor.

prompt.objective: Build a futuristic 3D music player with swappable skins and a dance floor.

mintAssets.brief: Five futuristic CD-player skins and controls.
Five electronic tracks for reactive playback.
Four rigged club dancers with looping dance sets.

experience: Switch tracks and skins, seek, orbit, and reset the player.
Turn the player into an audio-reactive dance floor.
prompt.visualDirection: Industrial 2089 hardware with orbital UI, Y2K acrylic, and neon.

thumbnail.alt: The PRISM skin of the CDX-2089 futuristic music player with its illuminated disc and controls.

social.title: CDX-2089 Music Player
social.description: A skin-adaptive 3D music player with five futuristic disc decks, audio-reactive visuals, and an unfolding dance floor.

image.alt: The PRISM skin of the CDX-2089 futuristic music player with its illuminated disc and controls.
